new_articles.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing'이다. The company plans to issue 17. 79 million new shares at a value of 45. 45 trillion won ($29. 65 billion). A visitor walks past the logo of SK hynix during the Korea Electronics Show 2025 at the COEX convention and exhibition centre in Seoul on October 22, 2025 SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change " "We expect to elevate our status as a global company by broadening our touchpoints in the United States, the epicenter of AI technological innovation," SK Hynix said in the filing SK Hynix is expanding rapidly to accommodate soaring demand for AI It's building a massive new campus of memory chip fabrication plants in South Korea, known as the Yongin Cluster, which is set to begin coming online in 2027, as well as building in the U. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Hyundai Motor's South Korean union approves strike action over stalled wage talks
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai Motor's South Korean union approves strike action over stalled wage talks'이다. Hyundai Motor's South Korean union members have voted to authorize a strike, signaling potential production halts. This action stems from unresolved wage talks, with the union demanding a significant base pay increase and a substantial performance bonus. They are also seeking assurances on employment and working conditions concerning AI integration, mirroring recent profit-sharing moves by other major tech firms. Union representatives had pledged to discuss strike plans if an agreement was not reached during government-mediated ⁠talks on Wednesday, ‌a union spokesperson said. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Coming to America: SK Hynix plans depository receipt listing on the Nasdaq
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Coming to America: SK Hynix plans depository receipt listing on the Nasdaq'이다. SK Hynix, one of the three major memory-chip makers that has surged in value due to huge demand for artificial-intelligence applications, said on Wednesday it’s going to issue American depository receipts, giving American investors an easier way of investing in the company. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung'이다. SK Hynix has risen to claim the title of South Korea's most valuable company, a testament to its visionary 14-year investment in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics Hyun Sun-yeop, a former SK Hynix HR executive, said its underdog ‌status made it work harder Its in-house foundry business supplies key components for HBM chips, while SK Hynix relies on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing to produce the so-called base die using less advanced technology SK Hynix's fortunes helped power South Korea's economy, its stock market and made its employees attractive marriage material In 2024, Chey, the SK Group chair, said SK Hynix should seek a market capitalization of 1 quadrillion won and eventually raise that to 2 quadrillion won, according to a book, Super Momentum. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korea's SK Hynix says to raise $29 billion in ADR listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's SK Hynix says to raise $29 billion in ADR listing'이다. South Korea's SK Hynix is planning a record-breaking secondary listing on the U. S. stock market, aiming to raise up to $29. 4 billion. This move capitalizes on strong investor demand for AI stocks, with the memory chip giant seeking to expand its capacity and gain access to U. investors.
new_articles.original_title: South Korea's SK Hynix says to raise $29 billion in ADR listing
new_articles.original_summary: South Korea's SK Hynix is planning a record-breaking secondary listing on the U.S. stock market, aiming to raise up to $29.4 billion. This move capitalizes on strong investor demand for AI stocks, with the memory chip giant seeking to expand its capacity and gain access to U.S. investors. The company, a key supplier to Nvidia, has seen its shares surge this year, outperforming rivals.

new_articles.title: South Korea's SK Hynix says to raise $29 billion in US ADR listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's SK Hynix says to raise $29 billion in US ADR listing'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, June 24 : South Korea's SK Hynix said on Wednesday it plans to raise 45. 45 trillion won ($29. 43 billion) via the listing of American Depository receipts (ADR) in the U. S. , as it seeks to expand its investor base and production capacity for chips used in artificial intelligence.

new_articles.title: KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout'이다. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung While no specific catalyst was blamed for the selling, analysts said it illustrated the growing concern on trading floors about the extended valuations of tech firms, which have been the key driver of a rally to record highs in several markets globally 84 per cent, following a media rout that the chipmaker plans a share buyback programme worth about 90 trillion won (US$58 Peer SK Hynix gained 0 Memory remains one of the critical bottlenecks in the global AI buildout, and neither SK hynix nor Samsung suddenly lost their strategic importance because the market had one violent session. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung'이다. SK Hynix has risen to claim the title of South Korea's most valuable company, a testament to its visionary 14-year investment in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics Hyun Sun-yeop, a former SK Hynix HR executive, said its underdog ‌status made it work harder Its in-house foundry business supplies key components for HBM chips, while SK Hynix relies on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing to produce the so-called base die using less advanced technology SK Hynix's fortunes helped power South Korea's economy, its stock market and made its employees attractive marriage material In 2024, Chey, the SK Group chair, said SK Hynix should seek a market capitalization of 1 quadrillion won and eventually raise that to 2 quadrillion won, according to a book, Super Momentum. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout'이다. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung While no specific catalyst was blamed for the selling, analysts said it illustrated the growing concern on trading floors about the extended valuations of tech firms, which have been the key driver of a rally to record highs in several markets globally 84 per cent, following a media rout that the chipmaker plans a share buyback programme worth about 90 trillion won (US$58 Peer SK Hynix gained 0 Memory remains one of the critical bottlenecks in the global AI buildout, and neither SK hynix nor Samsung suddenly lost their strategic importance because the market had one violent session. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea's KOSPI tanks nearly 10% to lead tech-fuelled Asia rout
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's KOSPI tanks nearly 10% to lead tech-fuelled Asia rout'이다. Samsung and SK Hynix shed more than 12 per cent each, triggering an automatic 20-minute bourse-wide trading halt in the afternoon. The benchmark KOSPI closed down 910 71 points, its biggest daily plunge since Mar 4, at 8,203 Market bellwether Samsung Electronics Co and peer SK Hynix shed more than 12 per cent each, wiping out billions in market value and triggering an automatic 20-minute bourse-wide trading halt in the afternoon The KOSPI has become increasingly dominated by the two chipmakers that now make up more than half of the market value, as they propelled the index past the historic 9,100-point level for the first time on Monday 55 per cent at closing, falling to 69,788. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21.7 billion, making it biggest in Hong Kong
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21.7 billion, making it biggest in Hong Kong'이다. Shares of memory‑chip giant SK Hynix have jumped over 300 per cent in 2026 amid the AI boom. SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21 PHOTO: REUTERS Published Jun 23, 2026, 12:00 PM Updated Jun 23, 2026, 07:07 PM SEOUL – CSOP Asset Management’s leveraged exchange traded product tied to SK Hynix has overtaken the Tracker Fund of Hong Kong to become the city’s largest ETF, highlighting investors’ voracious appetite for risky bets on the booming semiconductor sector Shares of memory-chip giant SK Hynix have jumped over 300 per cent in 2026, buoyed by strong earnings growth and optimism around artificial intelligence demand CSOP’s SK Hynix leveraged product “has ridden the AI, chip, tech wave and has returned almost 900 per cent year-to-date with almost US$2 billion of inflows while the rest is market appreciation,” said Bloomberg Intelligence ETF analyst Rebecca Sin BLOOMBERG More on this topic In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch South Korea’s early exports jump again as AI boom fuels chip demand See more on South Korea Semiconductors Stocks and shares E-paper Newsletters Podcasts RSS Feed About Us Terms & Conditions Personal Data Protection Notice Need help? 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch'이다. Employees at the firms now being ranked alongside doctors, lawyers and people from other traditionally elite professions. “If SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today, they are closer to A+,” said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller “But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often ‘Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer “The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense,” said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students ” Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the programme’s admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
